prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for acrolein (8 atoms: O, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1 for the neutral species (cation: charge +1, mult 2; anion: charge −1, mult 2). Partial charges were computed via the Mulliken scheme. Geometry was taken directly from the user-supplied XYZ file (no re-optimization at this level). The headline value reported is the largest f⁺ (Fukui function for electrophilic attack) = 0.64232102, located on atom 4 (C, the β-carbon) — identifying it as the most electrophilic site and the primary Michael acceptor site of acrolein, consistent with chemical expectation. The most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (O, carbonyl oxygen) with f⁻ = 0.39388616. All integrity checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000); the engine reported integrity.trustworthy = true. All three integrity check messages (listed verbatim in warnings) are informational PASS messages, not errors. No warnings of concern were raised.
